subject: TSL Daily — Mar 19, 2026
html:
TSL Daily — Thursday, March 19, 2026

Meetings

Sam / DZ (today, ~5pm)

  • Pitch deck triage MVP nearly ready — drag-and-drop UI with collaborative feedback and quick-action buttons. Demo target is tomorrow.
  • Deep dive on Erasmus/Inference (competitor): team of ~4, quantitative data-room reports, but produces no negative findings even for bad funds. Their weakness is qualitative analysis — that's TSL's opening.
  • Two core product principles confirmed: (1) multiplayer/community-driven, (2) qualitative over quantitative — "Sam/David as a service."
  • DZ to handle fund data enrichment in batches of 5–10 using Claude, leveraging GP names, emails, and LinkedIn.
  • LPA/side letter analysis flagged as a high-value future differentiator — unique terms, MFN clause tracking — especially for family offices.
  • New home page wireframe finalized: Needs Attention · Pipeline Updates · Discovery.

Open Tasks

TASKS.md not found — pulled from recent meeting context.

Sam:

  • Ship pitch deck triage MVP demo (target: tomorrow, for Charlotte)
  • Finalize home page card layout changes
  • Send Supabase fund field structure to David

David:

  • Complete fund data enrichment (5–10 funds at a time via Claude)
  • Prepare 5 pitch decks for Charlotte triage review
  • Complete Shy Goldman fund list in CSV format

Waiting on:

  • Charlotte: Formal advisory agreement documentation (follow-up from Mar 16)
  • NY event April 27 — logistics TBD

Suggested Priorities for Tomorrow

  1. [product] Ship the pitch deck triage demo. This is the concrete commitment to Charlotte and the unlock for her LP introductions. Everything else follows from her becoming an active user.
  2. [gtm] David: advance fund data enrichment pipeline. Having a populated, quality fund database is what makes TSL usable for Charlotte — and any future LP customers — before the April 27 NY event.
  3. [ops] Nail down the advisory agreement with Charlotte. She's ready to formalize. Getting this done removes friction before the NY event push.

Sam / DZ (Mar 19) · TSL/Allocator Ideas +Charlotte (Mar 16) · Sam / David Weekly Catch Up (Mar 16)
